revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Location map/data/Japan Kyoto Prefecture/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map templates]] to [[:Category:Japan prefecture location map modules]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
revision.text:
<!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> {{Module:Location map/data/doc | see also = * [[Module:Location map/data/Japan]]
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Japan prefecture location map modules|Kyoto Prefecture]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23076956737|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
